text: Ever wonder why species evolve just to survive? Introducing the Red Queen hypothesis. It's about constant evolutionary pressure. Imagine running as fast as you can, but still going nowhere. Species must adapt to survive predators, diseases, and rivals. It's a never-ending race. In this struggle, evolution is relentless. Sometimes, uncertainty prevails. Curious to learn more about evolution? Like and follow for deeper insights!
